text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian doesn't show up for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go looking for her and find a familiar face in a
nearby bathhouse.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
With hot water that good, there's only one thing
to pair it with!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Heh, that hits the spot—right in my core.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I guess I soaked too long. ...My bad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn Narita Brian to be more careful from now
on.
